## API spec impact

## Checklist

- [ ] `ruff format --check .` is clean (`format`).
- [ ] `ruff check .` passes (`lint`).
- [ ] `mypy src` passes (`types`).
- [ ] `pytest -q` passes (`test`).
- [ ] New/changed public items have docstrings.
